title: crataegus crus-galli var. pachyphylla
intro: Crataegus crus-galli var. pachyphylla, also known as the Chinese hawthorn, is a plant species in the family Rosaceae, characterized by its small, fragrant flowers and red or yellow fruits. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties, which include antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and cardiotonic effects. The health benefits of Crataegus crus-galli var. pachyphylla include improving cardiovascular health, reducing cholesterol levels, and supporting digestive health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
